text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, November 08. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Planning for future education costs. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Refinancing is a great leverage point. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. That's good medical feedback. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 4th grade level now. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. School projects are fun. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I've noted that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Let's break this down. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that modified the smart-home alert integrations. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning for future education costs. First United Mortgage offered 5.65% with zero points. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I can run some projections for you. A rate of 5.65% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Took Lily to her medical checkup. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. That's good medical feedback. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. He is doing so well. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, I'm reviewing the secure messaging specs for Vertex Health. Our Twilio integration is throwing 429 rate limit errors during signups. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I checked the recent logs for that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Here is what I recommend. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Busy day at Vertex Health. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
